actions.name: create_user
actions.risk: creates a new Phyllo end-user record that every subsequent Connect/account/profile flow is anchored to; low-risk external mutation, no destructive side effect, no approval required

actions.name: update_account
actions.risk: changes an account's identity/engagement/income monitoring configuration (e.g. STANDARD vs EXTENSIVE data collection level), affecting what data Phyllo collects going forward; external mutation, approval required

actions.name: disconnect_account
actions.risk: revokes Phyllo's connection to the creator's linked social/creator platform account, permanently stopping all future data collection for it; destructive external mutation, approval required

actions.name: create_webhook
actions.risk: registers a new webhook endpoint that will receive Phyllo event notifications; low-risk external mutation, no approval required

actions.name: update_webhook
actions.risk: changes an existing webhook's target URL and/or subscribed event set, redirecting future event delivery; external mutation, approval required

actions.name: delete_webhook
actions.risk: permanently removes a webhook subscription, stopping all future event delivery to it; destructive external mutation, approval required
